basic_info.description: I am Mohammad Shoaib. I am a third-year student of Bangladesh University of Textiles (BUTEX). I am enthusiastic about Data Science and Business Analytics. I am acquiring knowledge of a wide range of domains, including deep learning, machine learning, data analytics, cloud computing, supply chain management and project management, to become prepared for the challenging future. I also participate in activities of various clubs and communities at university and outside to gain team-work and leadership skills.

projects.title: Extract Text From Images
projects.description: In this project I have used Azure’s Computer Vision API to extract text from image. I have developed the interface using flask and deployed it on Heroku

projects.title: E-commerce Web-app (React.js, Django)
projects.description: In this project I have used Azure’s Computer Vision API to extract text from image. I have developed the interface using flask and deployed it on Heroku

projects.title: PhotoHome Price Predictiongraphy
projects.description: Developed a ML model for predicting home price of Bengaluru City. Developed backend & interface using Flask, JavaScript, HTML, CSS and deployed it in Digital Ocean using nginx:)

education.title: Bangladesh University of Textiles (BUTEX)
description: I am doing my major in Industrial and Production Engieering. I am an active member of different clubs and societies. I have also worked as a Class Reprensative. Due to covid-19, my university was not in session for a few months and our graduation has been delayed. I am expecting to graduate in 2022.

education.title: MITx on edX
description: The MicroMasters program credential from MIT Open Learning is a professional and academic credential for online learners from anywhere in the world. MicroMasters program in Supply Chain Management represents the equivalent of one semester of coursework at MIT. I had to complete 5 courses and a final comprehensive exam to earn the credential.

certifications.title: DeepLearning.AI TensorFlow Developer
description: It certifies that I have learned how to build and train neural networks using TensorFlow, how to improve network performance using convolutions as you train it to identify real-world images, how to teach machines to understand, analyze, and respond to human speech with natural language processing systems, and more!

certifications.title: Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Scientist Associate
description: Azure Data Scientist Associate certification validates the skills and knowledge to apply Azure’s machine learning techniques to train, evaluate, and deploy models that solve business problems.

certifications.title: Microsoft Certified: Data Analyst Associate
description: Data Analyst Associate certification validates the skills and knowledge required to enable businesses to maximize the value of their data assets by using Microsoft Power BI.

certifications.title: Google IT Support
description: Google IT Support Professional Certificate validates successfull completion of five-courses, developed by Google, that include hands-on, practice-based assessments and are designed to prepare them for entry-level roles in IT support.

certifications.title: Architecting with Google Compute Engine
description: Data Analyst Associate certification validates the skills and knowledge required to enable businesses to maximize the value of their data assets by using Microsoft Power BI.
